category_sources: Official Gatekeeper repository describes it as Policy Controller for Kubernetes.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI utility for Open Policy Agent Gatekeeper.
display_name_sources: Official repository is Gatekeeper; gator is the packaged CLI utility within that project.
source_facts.name is gator and executable is gator.
docs_sources: Official Gatekeeper README points to the Gatekeeper website for in-depth documentation.
Official repository contains a docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/open-policy-agent/gatekeeper; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Gatekeeper README describes Kubernetes CRDs, constraints, policy library, mutation, audit, and external data support.
source_facts.description identifies Open Policy Agent Gatekeeper CLI utility.
